children.text: This page is hidden to others because it violated the Community Guidelines
I have some news to tell you! WITH LAVAPELT!

"Hia fellow cats! You all know nightclan right? Well we have a announcement!
But first, nightclan private auditions are up and open but beware of the time zones!
I am english so don't expect me to be on at your morning, I may be fast asleep in
Camp."
